name: Yoshino Koiwai
description: Yoshino is Aki's maid and follower. She seems to be a clumsy girl. However, beneath her clumsy and shy appearance she is actually extremely deceptive and cold, able to deceive and hurt Aki without a second thought. name: Ron Kamonohashi
description: A talented detective and the student with the highest grades in Detective Training Academy BLUE's history. As his detective license was revoked after an incident five years ago, he has partnered up with Totomaru Isshiki to still be able to solve cases. ~!Later, it is confirmed that Ron Kamonohashi isn't the true culprit behind the Bloody Field Trip, but "Shachi". It was to ruin his detective life.!~

name: Felt
description: **Height:** 150 cm (4'11") A thief that lives in the slums. Felt stole Emilia's insignia, hoping for quick, easy cash. Though Felt can usually handle her own, she does consider Rom to be like family. ~!After being chosen by the insignia, she is forced to participate in the Royal Selection and is currently a candidate to become the 42nd King of Lugunica.!~

Strangely, despite his apathy towards humans and willingness to kill them, he has been shown to be more compassionate for other living beings. In Switzerland, he sliced a car that was about to hit a puppy in half, and later on maneuvered himself during a long fall to miss a patch of flowers near the bottom of the cliff. She treats everyone with kindness, even former enemies. She doesn't want to fight unless she necessarily has to and wouldn't want to have pointless battles when she believes the problem could be talked about calmly first.

name: Orsted

Similar to other Dragon Race people such as [Perugius](https://anilist.co/character/209572/Perugius-Dola), he has silver hair and golden sanpaku eyes with an overpowering look. name: Sakura Nanamine
description: Nanamine Sakura is a 3rd-year student at Kamome Academy's High School division. She made a contract with Tsukasa and is now bound to him. She is a member of the school's broadcasting club.

name: Kawaki

name: Komichi Akebi
description: Class 1-3, student number 1. A girl who has a strong yearning for sailor uniforms due to a certain reason. She has a bright and straightforward personality, and is really looking forward to school life. She is very good at sports. (Source: Official Site, Translated)

name: Sigma
description: Sigma is a member of the terrorist organization, "Decay of Angels", and owner of the Sky Casino. His ability is unknown, but stated by Fyodor to be the weakest of the Angels. It may be more support-oriented than combat-oriented because of this. He is shown to be very kind to his customers and to have a sense of pride and ownership over his casino.

name: Tomohiro Nagatsuka
description: A short, fat, and lonely boy who is a habitual liar. When someone tries to steal Nagatsuka's bike, Ishida offers his to be taken instead. Nagatsuka sees this act of kindness as an unbreakable act of friendship and swiftly becomes Ishida's self-proclaimed best friend and starts to idolize Ishida. He is shown to be quite obsessive and protective of Ishida and often dislikes him befriending other people. However, Nagatsuka is also supportive of Ishida and often offers advice. name: Kazuki Kurusu
description: [Instagram](https://www.instagram.com/fantastic_sweeper0516/) Kazuki lives with his colleague and buddy Rei, who also looks after his personal needs. Contracting, gathering information in advance, and making execution plans are the main areas of work with Rei. He likes women and gambling and he has good communication skills. name: Satsujinki
description: __Height:__ 185 cm (6'1") An Akudama. His estimated prison sentence is 967 years. Cutthroat's hobby is murder. Paradoxically, his usual behavior is innocent and almost childlike. He becomes unable to control his murderous impulses under certain conditions, especially when he sees the color red. Just simply seeing the color red makes him excited to the point of childlike giddiness. name: Hiro Shishigami
description: This young man cares about his childhood friend Ando and his mother more than anyone, but is completely indifferent to anyone else. Just like Inuyashiki, Shishigami got a mechanical body after being involved in the same UFO accident, but unlike Inuyashiki, he uses his powers to commit crimes in order to feel alive. ~! In the end he self destructs himself to change the trajectory of the asteroid that was about to hit the earth and destroy it. !~

name: Kaname Kuran
description: **Height:** 184 cm A pureblood vampire. He saved Yuuki from an attack by another vampire when she was little. Kaname is the class president of the Night Class, much feared and respected by the other Night Class students. While he is cold and authoritative towards his fellows in the Night Class, he is always kind and sweet to Yuuki. name: Levy McGarden
description: __Height:__ 155cm __Magic:__ Solid Script Mage Levy is a member of the Fairy Tail Guild's team Shadow Gear, along with Jet and Droy. She has a cheerful personality, being able to get along with many other guild members. Levy loves to read books, she and Lucy Heartfilia quickly became friends through their mutual love for books. name: Yoshida
description: Yoshida is the main male character of the Hige wo Soru. Soshite Joshikousei wo Hirou. series. He is an office worker in Tokyo who lives alone in his apartment. One night, after being rejected by his boss, Airi Gotou, he had a fateful encounter with a runaway high school girl named Sayu. Living alone most of his life, Yoshida grew to be a highly independent person. name: Chouji Ochiai
description: A childhood friend of Kenji's who created the "Friend" symbol and became a salaryman. Later traveled to Tibet and Thailand after his son died, at which point he gets involved in the dealings of the "Friend" group. 長治 is sometimes misread as "Nagaharu" but his first name is Chouji.
